title: Diagnostic immunomarker cards (CD99/MIC2, NKX2-2), cited + graded
context: The diagnostic immunomarker cards cover CD99/MIC2 and NKX2-2, stating diagnostic use with sensitivity/specificity caveats and the non-specificity of CD99. Each assertion is cited + graded, with no diagnostic instruction to any individual. MEDIUM risk-tier research reference, gated on a TO-BE-SECURED domain reviewer. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Draft the CD99/MIC2 and NKX2-2 immunomarker cards stating diagnostic use with sensitivity/specificity caveats and CD99 non-specificity, every assertion cited + graded, no individual diagnostic instruction, with domain-reviewer sign-off recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: CD99 and NKX2-2 cards state diagnostic use with sensitivity/specificity caveats and non-specificity of CD99, each assertion cited + graded
No diagnostic instruction to any individual; carries the 'research reference - not clinical guidance' frame
Domain-reviewer sign-off recorded (reviewer TO BE SECURED)
